full_name: Nickel Alloy, Corrosion and Heat-Resistant, Sheet, Strip, and Plate, 52.5Ni-19Cr-3.0Mo-5.1Cb-0.90Ti-0.60Al-18Fe, Consumable Electrode or Vacuum Induction Melted, 1775F (968C) Solution Heat Treated (Alloy 718 / Inconel 718)
version_year: see SAE catalog for current revision
scope: Alloy 718 (Inconel 718, UNS N07718) sheet, strip, and plate, solution-heat-treated and precipitation-hardenable, for aerospace parts.

chemical_composition.note: Limiting composition of Alloy 718 as widely published by independent sources (Special Metals, MatWeb); values in wt%.

mechanical_properties.note: Typical room-temperature properties of Alloy 718 sheet after age hardening, from independent datasheets.

license_note: Alloy composition/property data for Inconel 718 is widely published by independent free sources (Special Metals, MatWeb, ASM). Not reproduced from the copyrighted AMS document; AMS 5596 designation used only as an identifier.
